Start of The Domain's impact. Population growth begins to accelerate. First year of ACS availability, but data is still best viewed as interpolated between decennial censuses.
Population growth continues to accelerate due to The Domain construction and first residential openings.
The Domain Phase 1 opens. The dramatic demographic shift is now clearly visible in all metrics.
Continued rapid infill of new residential units at The Domain.

Values align well with the 2020 Decennial Census and 2016-2020 ACS for Tract 420.0. The extremely low homeownership rate reflects the dominance of new, large-scale apartment complexes.
